---
title: "Meet the STEMcoding Team!"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
---

<style>
  /* Page layout */
  .page-columns .page-full {
    display: block !important;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* Section headings without anchors */
  .section-heading {
    font-family: var(--sc-font-display);
    font-size: 1.55rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--sc-ink);
    margin-top: 2.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }

  .section-heading::after {
    content: "";
    display: block;
    width: 56px;
    height: 4px;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 2px;
    background: var(--sc-grad-text);
  }

  .section-heading:first-of-type {
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  /* Current team grid */
  .team-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem;
    margin: 2rem 0;
  }

  .team-member {
    text-align: center;
    background: var(--sc-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--sc-border);
    border-radius: var(--sc-radius);
    padding: 1.5rem;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }

  .team-member:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: var(--sc-shadow);
  }

  .team-member img {
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin: 0 auto 1rem;
    border: 3px solid var(--sc-red);
    display: block;
  }

  .team-member strong {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--sc-ink);
    display: block;
    margin: 0.5rem 0 0.1rem;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .team-member strong + * {
    color: var(--sc-mute);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    margin: 0;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* Former team list */
  .former-team {
    column-count: 2;
    column-gap: 3rem;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }

  .former-team li {
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  /* Responsive */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .team-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .former-team {
      column-count: 1;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="section-heading">Current Team</div>

::: {.team-grid}
::: {.team-member}
![](/img/orban.jpeg)

**Chris Orban**
Prof. of Physics at OSU Marion
:::

::: {.team-member}
![](/img/zimmerman.jpeg)

**Scott Zimmerman**
Prof. of Mathematics at OSU Marion
:::

::: {.team-member}
![](/img/kulp.jpeg)

**Jessica Kulp**
Grad student OSU EHE
:::

::: {.team-member}
![](/img/butler.png)

**Julie Butler**
University of Mount Union
:::
:::

<div class="section-heading">Former Team Members</div>

<ul class="former-team">
  <li>Kelsey Badger</li>
  <li>Lilith Daemon</li>
  <li>Nash Brecht</li>
  <li>Brian Gainer</li>
  <li>Joe Griffith</li>
  <li>Victoria Hartmann</li>
  <li>Jacob Moore</li>
  <li>Chris Porter</li>
  <li>Richelle Teeling-Smith</li>
  <li>Demetrius Tuggle</li>
</ul>
